articles.description: On Tuesday (September 28), the yield on the U.S. 10 Year Treasury Note hit 1.559%, which is the highest it has been in over three months, as the result of which both tech stocks and cryptoassets have suffered losses. articles.description: On-chain data shows whale ratio has exceeded the 0.50 mark, historically a sign that whales are dumping in the short term. Bitcoin Whales Have Started Selling Their Coins As pointed out by a CryptoQuant post, the Bitcoin whale ratio has started going up above the 0.50 level.
